message: Jake
Cindy
Tim
I visited their house, but unfortunately, it seems both of them are out.
I visited their house, but they weren't home. It's a shame, but I guess I'll come back later.
Ah, welcome!
They are at work.
I'm bored here all alone.
Welcome, I'm so happy you came again.

There's nobody else here.
It seems they haven’t returned from work yet.
This room, surrounded by buildings, doesn’t seem to receive sunlight even during the day. Considering the location, the rent must be dirt cheap.
Besides a single bed, there's only a hard wooden chair.
Are they sleeping together in the same bed?
Before meeting their biological mother, are they feeling a bit nervous? A shadow is visible in their usually cheerful expression.
It seems like she's relieved to be away from work. I feel like I'm catching a glimpse of a teenage girl’s face I’ve never seen before.
Thanks to having no one to talk to, I’m completely bored out of my mind. It's a pain I’ve never experienced while working.
I was bored alone again today. I guess I'm not good at spending time by myself.
You should try to find something you want to do and give it a go.
I don’t have anything like that. That’s why it’s tough.
I’m thinking about going to work somewhere.
The day for the mother-daughter meeting is coming soon.
Yeah, that’s right.
I’m so nervous. Isn’t that funny?
It’s not funny at all. But, are you perhaps excited? About meeting your mom?
I don’t know. But I’m really curious.
I keep thinking about what to wear.
Just be yourself.
I know, but I want to look a little nice.
I’m really looking forward to meeting her, but will I even recognize her?
It'll be fine, Yuriko will introduce you.
Yuriko is the girl who was at the party, right?
That's right, so you can feel at ease.
Okay! Ah, I’m kinda looking forward to it. But I'm anxious.
I have to call her ‘Mom,’ right? But I wonder what she’ll think of me.
After the audition, I’ll have a part-time job. He hardly hangs out with me. It’s like he’s making fun of me!
He’s working hard too, you know.
I get that, but still.
But I’m a bit dissatisfied.
I just want him to be closer to me.
He has his own thoughts too.
No way, no way, no way!
I really don’t want to. But I won’t do any work.
Ariana is a bit dissatisfied. That's because
you don't pay attention to me. Sniff.
If you're bored, you should just go back to work.
I'd never want to do that.
Come on, that's a bit over the top.
But I hate things I dislike! I really don't want to go back to Gloria's place.
I feel bad for the others besides Gloria. But, there are plenty of people who could take my place.
That's not true,
right?
no one else could replace me.
Even if you say that,
I absolutely refuse.
Let's stop talking about work. Right now, I'm overwhelmed with thoughts about my birth mother.
The audition is over, and she must feel a sense of relief, but she's still facing her mother.
The pressure that keeps piling up may be bearable because she has been trained in a special line of work.
It seems she's stubbornly refusing to return to work, but was there a fierce conflict with Gloria?
To make things easier for her, it might be better to confess that Meryl is her mother.
The lack of money is probably true as well, but going out to work during the day is.
isn't it because she doesn't want to face him?
More than for herself, it’s certainly for her own sake.
It seemed like he was concerned about her. He might actually be a good guy at heart.
He is aware of how
incompatible he is with her and what will happen to her after she reunites with her mother.
She probably has endless worries.
Come visit again.
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
